plist.dict: CFBundleDevelopmentRegion $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE) CFBundleDisplayName MoltbotTests CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundleInfoDictionaryVersion 6.0 CFBundleName $(PRODUCT_NAME) CFBundlePackageType <<<<<<< HEAD BNDL CFBundleShortVersionString <<<<<<< HEAD <<<<<<< HEAD 2026.1.27-beta.1 CFBundleVersion 20260126 ======= 2026.2.2 ======= 2026.2.9 >>>>>>> fb8c653f5 (chore(release): 2026.2.9) CFBundleVersion 20260202 >>>>>>> 1c4db9159 (chore: prepare 2026.2.2 release)
